description: Raymond James Financial is a diversified financial services firm built around wealth management, capital markets, asset management, and banking services for individuals, institutions, corporations, and municipalities.

overview.title: Business Scope
paragraphs: Raymond James Financial operates as a capital-markets and advisory platform rather than a narrow investment bank. Its core businesses include the Private Client Group, capital markets, asset management, banking, and related services, with wealth management as the public-facing center of gravity.

The company has been public since 1983 and trades on the NYSE under RJF. Its scale is substantial: Raymond James reported total client assets of $1.76 trillion as of March 31, 2026, which gives the firm enough heft to make every brochure about 'personal' advice arrive with institutional machinery politely humming underneath.

overview.title: Product Surfaces
paragraphs: Raymond James Wealth Management is the key consumer-facing product surface, combining advisor relationships, investment planning, brokerage, fee-based accounts, retirement planning, trust services, banking and lending referrals, cash management, and client account access.

Raymond James Investment Banking serves corporate and institutional clients through advisory and capital-raising capabilities, including mergers and acquisitions, capital markets, capital structure advisory, private capital advisory, private credit, and sector-focused coverage. The firm also operates equity research, fixed income capital markets, public finance, and institutional trading services.

overview.title: Registry Relevance
paragraphs: For Free The World, Raymond James is best treated as financial infrastructure: a gatekeeper for advice, custody, securities access, research, cash sweeps, lending, and corporate finance. The relevant comparison set is not a single app replacement, but a stack of open financial planning tools, low-cost brokerages, transparent index products, credit unions, community banks, open banking rails, and public-interest market data.

No technology waves are currently mapped in repo context. Initial research should therefore prioritize product boundaries, client data portability, fee transparency, advisor platform dependencies, proprietary research access, banking/cash sweep economics, and whether any open or cooperative alternatives can realistically reduce user lock-in without pretending that investment banking is solved by a spreadsheet and good intentions.

sourceSuggestions.title: Raymond James Investor Relations
sourceSuggestions.whyItMatters: Primary source for company description, annual reports, quarterly earnings, operating data, and public-company context.

sourceSuggestions.title: Raymond James Fiscal Q2 2026 Results
sourceSuggestions.whyItMatters: Current segment and scale data, including client assets, revenue mix, Private Client Group, capital markets, asset management, and bank results.

sourceSuggestions.title: Raymond James Wealth Management
sourceSuggestions.whyItMatters: Primary product surface for individual investors and the best starting point for mapping client-facing services.

sourceSuggestions.title: Raymond James Investment Banking
sourceSuggestions.whyItMatters: Primary source for investment banking capabilities, advisory services, industry coverage, and recent capital-markets expansion.

sourceSuggestions.title: Raymond James Investment Management
sourceSuggestions.whyItMatters: Explains the asset management platform and boutique manager structure that supports investment products and institutional strategies.

sourceSuggestions.title: Raymond James Bank
sourceSuggestions.whyItMatters: Documents banking, mortgage, securities-based lending, corporate and commercial banking, and deposit-account services tied to the broader platform.

sourceSuggestions.title: SEC EDGAR Company Filings: Raymond James Financial
sourceSuggestions.whyItMatters: Authoritative source for 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, proxy, risk factors, segment reporting, and regulatory disclosures.

sourceSuggestions.title: CompaniesMarketCap: Raymond James Market Cap
sourceSuggestions.whyItMatters: Useful external reference for market-cap trend context and index-ranking validation against the repo snapshot.
